column2: Southwest of Utah Beach, June 6th, 1944. The 101st Airborne is dropped before the Normandy landings but the drop goes badly. Units scattered widely, and elements of the 506th must capture the causeways off Utah Beach.
The American player wins if he exits at least 4 squads off the East edge of the map by the end of turn 5. Otherwise the German player wins.
All American units enter the West edge of the game board on turn 1.
Group 1: set up in any hex with the number 3 or 4. Group 2: set up in any hex with the number 5 or 6.
